description:
The Plane REST API

Visit our quick start guide and full API documentation at [developers.plane.so](https://developers.plane.so/api-reference/introduction).

tools.name: assets_create-generic-upload
tools.description: Generate presigned URL for generic asset upload. Required: name, size. Optional: external_id, external_source, project_id (plus 1 more).

params.name: external_id
params.description: External identifier for the asset (for integration tracking)

params.name: project_id
params.description: UUID of the project to associate with the asset

tools.name: assets_create-user-upload
tools.description: Generate presigned URL for user asset upload. Required: entity_type, name, size. Optional: type.

params.name: entity_type
params.description: Type of user asset * `USER_AVATAR` - User Avatar * `USER_COVER` - User Cover

params.name: type
params.description: MIME type of the file * `image/jpeg` - JPEG * `image/png` - PNG * `image/webp` - WebP * `image/jpg` - JPG * `image/gif` - GIF

tools.name: assets_delete-user
tools.description: Delete user asset. Delete a user profile asset (avatar or cover image) and remove its reference from the user profile. This performs a soft delete by marking the asset as deleted and updating the user's profile. Required: asset_id. Destructive.

tools.name: assets_get-generic
tools.description: Get presigned URL for asset download. Required: asset_id.

tools.name: assets_update-generic
tools.description: Update generic asset after upload completion. Required: asset_id. Optional: is_uploaded (default: true). Partial update.

params.name: is_uploaded
params.description: Whether the asset has been successfully uploaded

tools.name: assets_update-user
tools.description: Mark user asset as uploaded. Required: asset_id. Optional: attributes. Partial update.

params.name: attributes
params.description: Additional attributes to update for the asset

tools.name: invitations_workspaces-create
tools.description: Create a workspace invite. Required: email. Optional: role. Returns the new WorkspaceInvite.

tools.name: invitations_workspaces-destroy
tools.description: Delete a workspace invite. Required: pk. Destructive.

tools.name: invitations_workspaces-list
tools.description: List all workspace invites for a workspace. Returns array of WorkspaceInvite.

tools.name: invitations_workspaces-partial-update
tools.description: Update a workspace invite. Required: pk. Optional: email, role. Returns the updated WorkspaceInvite.

tools.name: invitations_workspaces-retrieve
tools.description: Get a workspace invite by ID. Required: pk. Returns the WorkspaceInvite.

tools.name: issues_get-workspace-work-item
tools.description: Retrieve a specific work item using workspace slug, project identifier, and issue identifier. Required: issue_identifier, project_identifier. Returns the Issue.

params.name: issue_identifier
params.description: Issue sequence ID (numeric identifier within project)

tools.name: issues_search-work-items
tools.description: Perform semantic search across issue names, sequence IDs, and project identifiers. Required: search. Optional: limit, project_id, workspace_search. Returns the IssueSearch.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of results to return

params.name: project_id
params.description: Project ID for filtering results within a specific project

params.name: search
params.description: Search query to filter results by name, description, or identifier

params.name: workspace_search
params.description: Whether to search across entire workspace or within specific project

tools.name: members_get-workspace
tools.description: Retrieve all users who are members of the specified workspace. Returns array of MembersGetWorkspaceItem.

tools.name: projects_create
tools.description: Create a new project in the workspace with default states and member assignments. Required: identifier, name. Optional: archive_in, close_in, cover_image (plus 16 more). Returns the new Project.

tools.name: projects_delete
tools.description: Permanently remove a project and all its associated data from the workspace. Required: pk. Destructive.

tools.name: projects_list
tools.description: Retrieve all projects in a workspace or get details of a specific project. Optional: cursor, expand, fields (plus 3 more). Returns array of Project.

params.name: cursor
params.description: Pagination cursor for getting next set of results

params.name: expand
params.description: Comma-separated list of related fields to expand in response

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in response

params.name: order_by
params.description: Field to order results by. Prefix with '-' for descending order

params.name: per_page
params.description: Number of results per page (default: 20, max: 100)

params.name: updated_at__gt
params.description: Incremental filter — return items updated after this RFC3339 timestamp.

tools.name: projects_retrieve
tools.description: Retrieve details of a specific project. Required: pk. Returns the Project.

tools.name: projects_update
tools.description: Partially update an existing project's properties like name, description, or settings. Required: pk. Optional: archive_in, close_in, cover_image (plus 20 more). Returns the updated Project.

tools.name: projects_archive_project
tools.description: Move a project to archived status, hiding it from active project lists. Required: project_id.

tools.name: projects_archive_unarchive-project
tools.description: Restore an archived project to active status, making it available in regular workflows. Required: project_id. Destructive.

tools.name: projects_archived-cycles_list
tools.description: Retrieve all cycles that have been archived in the project. Required: project_id. Optional: cursor, per_page, updated_at__gt. Returns array of Cycle.

params.name: cursor
params.description: Pagination cursor for getting next set of results

params.name: per_page
params.description: Number of results per page (default: 20, max: 100)

params.name: updated_at__gt
params.description: Incremental filter — return items updated after this RFC3339 timestamp.

tools.name: projects_archived-cycles_unarchive-cycle
tools.description: Restore an archived cycle to active status, making it available for regular use. Required: cycle_id, project_id. Destructive.

tools.name: projects_archived-modules_list
tools.description: Retrieve all modules that have been archived in the project. Required: project_id. Optional: cursor, expand, fields (plus 3 more). Returns array of Module.

params.name: cursor
params.description: Pagination cursor for getting next set of results

params.name: expand
params.description: Comma-separated list of related fields to expand in response

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in response

params.name: order_by
params.description: Field to order results by. Prefix with '-' for descending order

params.name: per_page
params.description: Number of results per page (default: 20, max: 100)

params.name: updated_at__gt
params.description: Incremental filter — return items updated after this RFC3339 timestamp.

tools.name: projects_archived-modules_unarchive-module
tools.description: Restore an archived module to active status, making it available for regular use. Required: pk, project_id. Destructive.

tools.name: projects_cycles_add-work-items
tools.description: Assign multiple work items to a cycle. Automatically handles bulk creation and updates with activity tracking. Required: cycle_id, project_id, issues. Returns the new CycleIssue.

params.name: issues
params.description: List of issue IDs to add to the cycle

tools.name: projects_cycles_archive
tools.description: Move a completed cycle to archived status for historical tracking. Only cycles that have ended can be archived. Required: cycle_id, project_id.

tools.name: projects_cycles_create
tools.description: Create a new development cycle with specified name, description, and date range. Supports external ID tracking for integration purposes. Required: project_id, name. Optional: description, end_date, external_id (plus 4 more). Returns the new Cycle.

params.name: owned_by
params.description: User who owns the cycle. If not provided, defaults to the current user.

tools.name: projects_cycles_delete
tools.description: Permanently remove a cycle and all its associated issue relationships. Required: pk, project_id. Destructive.

tools.name: projects_cycles_delete-work-item
tools.description: Remove a work item from a cycle while keeping the work item in the project. Required: cycle_id, issue_id, project_id. Destructive.

tools.name: projects_cycles_list
tools.description: Retrieve all cycles in a project. Supports filtering by cycle status like current, upcoming, completed, or draft. Required: project_id. Optional: cursor, cycle_view, expand (plus 4 more). Returns array of Cycle.

params.name: cursor
params.description: Pagination cursor for getting next set of results

params.name: expand
params.description: Comma-separated list of related fields to expand in response

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in response

params.name: order_by
params.description: Field to order results by. Prefix with '-' for descending order

params.name: per_page
params.description: Number of results per page (default: 20, max: 100)

params.name: updated_at__gt
params.description: Incremental filter — return items updated after this RFC3339 timestamp.

tools.name: projects_cycles_list-work-items
tools.description: Retrieve all work items assigned to a cycle. Required: cycle_id, project_id. Optional: cursor, per_page, updated_at__gt. Returns array of Issue.

params.name: cursor
params.description: Pagination cursor for getting next set of results

params.name: per_page
params.description: Number of results per page (default: 20, max: 100)

params.name: updated_at__gt
params.description: Incremental filter — return items updated after this RFC3339 timestamp.

tools.name: projects_cycles_retrieve
tools.description: Retrieve details of a specific cycle by its ID. Supports cycle status filtering. Required: pk, project_id. Returns the Cycle.

tools.name: projects_cycles_retrieve-work-item
tools.description: Retrieve details of a specific cycle work item. Required: cycle_id, issue_id, project_id. Returns the CycleIssue.

tools.name: projects_cycles_transfer-work-items
tools.description: Move incomplete work items from the current cycle to a new target cycle. Captures progress snapshot and transfers only unfinished work items. Required: cycle_id, project_id, new_cycle_id. Returns the new CyclesTransferWorkItemsResponse.

params.name: new_cycle_id
params.description: ID of the target cycle to transfer issues to

tools.name: projects_cycles_update
tools.description: Modify an existing cycle's properties like name, description, or date range. Completed cycles can only have their sort order changed. Required: pk, project_id. Optional: description, end_date, external_id (plus 5 more). Returns the updated Cycle.

params.name: owned_by
params.description: User who owns the cycle. If not provided, defaults to the current user.

tools.name: projects_intake-issues_create-intake-work-item
tools.description: Submit a new work item to the project's intake queue for review and triage. Automatically creates the work item with default triage state and tracks activity. Required: project_id, issue. Returns the new IntakeIssue.

tools.name: projects_intake-issues_delete-intake-work-item
tools.description: Permanently remove an intake work item from the triage queue. Also deletes the underlying work item if it hasn't been accepted yet. Required: issue_id, project_id. Destructive.

tools.name: projects_intake-issues_get-intake-work-items-list
tools.description: Retrieve all work items in the project's intake queue. Returns paginated results when listing all intake work items. Required: project_id. Optional: cursor, expand, fields (plus 1 more).

params.name: cursor
params.description: Pagination cursor for getting next set of results

params.name: expand
params.description: Comma-separated list of related fields to expand in response

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in response

params.name: per_page
params.description: Number of results per page (default: 20, max: 100)

tools.name: projects_intake-issues_retrieve-intake-work-item
tools.description: Retrieve details of a specific intake work item. Required: issue_id, project_id. Returns the IntakeIssue.

tools.name: projects_intake-issues_update-intake-work-item
tools.description: Modify an existing intake work item's properties or status for triage processing. Supports status changes like accept, reject, or mark as duplicate. Required: issue_id, project_id. Optional: duplicate_to, issue, snoozed_till (plus 3 more). Returns the updated IntakeIssue.

tools.name: projects_issues_create-work-item
tools.description: Create a new work item in the specified project with the provided details. Required: project_id, name. Optional: archived_at, assignees, completed_at (plus 18 more). Returns the new Issue.

tools.name: projects_issues_create-work-item-attachment
tools.description: Generate presigned URL for uploading file attachments to a work item. Required: issue_id, project_id, name, size. Optional: external_id, external_source, type.

params.name: external_id
params.description: External identifier for the asset (for integration tracking)

tools.name: projects_issues_create-work-item-comment
tools.description: Add a new comment to a work item with HTML content. Required: issue_id, project_id. Optional: access, comment_html, comment_json (plus 2 more). Returns array of string.

tools.name: projects_issues_create-work-item-link
tools.description: Add a new external link to a work item with URL, title, and metadata. Required: issue_id, project_id, url. Optional: title. Returns the new IssueLink.

tools.name: projects_issues_delete-work-item
tools.description: Permanently delete an existing work item from the project. Only admins or the item creator can perform this action. Required: pk, project_id. Destructive.

tools.name: projects_issues_delete-work-item-attachment
tools.description: Permanently remove an attachment from a work item. Records deletion activity for audit purposes. Required: issue_id, pk, project_id. Destructive.

tools.name: projects_issues_delete-work-item-comment
tools.description: Permanently remove a comment from a work item. Records deletion activity for audit purposes. Required: issue_id, pk, project_id. Destructive.

tools.name: projects_issues_delete-work-item-link
tools.description: Permanently remove an external link from a work item. Required: issue_id, pk, project_id. Destructive.

tools.name: projects_issues_list-work-item-activities
tools.description: Retrieve all activities for a work item. Supports filtering by activity type and date range. Required: issue_id, project_id. Optional: cursor, expand, fields (plus 3 more). Returns array of IssueActivity.

params.name: cursor
params.description: Pagination cursor for getting next set of results

params.name: expand
params.description: Comma-separated list of related fields to expand in response

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in response

params.name: order_by

params.name: per_page
params.description: Number of results per page (default: 20, max: 100)

params.name: updated_at__gt
params.description: Incremental filter — return items updated after this RFC3339 timestamp.

tools.description: Retrieve all attachments for a work item. Required: issue_id, project_id. Optional: updated_at__gt. Returns the IssueAttachment.

params.name: updated_at__gt
params.description: Incremental filter — return items updated after this RFC3339 timestamp.

tools.description: Retrieve details of a specific comment. Required: issue_id, pk, project_id. Returns array of string.

tools.name: projects_issues_update-link
tools.description: Modify the URL, title, or metadata of an existing issue link. Required: issue_id, pk, project_id. Optional: title, url. Returns the updated IssueLink.

tools.name: projects_issues_update-work-item
tools.description: Partially update an existing work item with the provided fields. Supports external ID validation to prevent conflicts. Required: pk, project_id. Optional: archived_at, assignees, completed_at (plus 19 more). Returns the updated Issue.

tools.name: projects_issues_update-work-item-comment
tools.description: Modify the content of an existing comment on a work item. Required: issue_id, pk, project_id. Optional: access, comment_html, comment_json (plus 2 more). Returns array of string.

tools.name: projects_issues_upload-work-item-attachment
tools.description: Mark an attachment as uploaded after successful file transfer to storage. Required: issue_id, pk, project_id. Partial update.

tools.name: projects_labels_create
tools.description: Create a new label in the specified project with name, color, and description. Required: project_id, name. Optional: color, description, external_id (plus 3 more). Returns the new Label.

tools.name: projects_labels_delete
tools.description: Permanently remove a label from the project. This action cannot be undone. Required: pk, project_id. Destructive.

tools.description: Retrieve details of a specific label. Required: pk, project_id. Returns the Label.

tools.description: Delete a project member. Required: pk, project_id. Destructive.

tools.name: projects_members_update-project
tools.description: Update a project member. Required: pk, project_id. Optional: member, role. Returns the updated ProjectMember.

tools.description: Create a new project member. Required: project_id, member. Optional: role. Returns the new ProjectMember.

tools.name: projects_summary_workspaces-projects-retrieve
tools.description: Get project summary Get the summary of a project. Required: project_id.

tools.name: projects_work-items_create-2
tools.description: Create a new work item in the specified project with the provided details. Required: project_id, name. Optional: archived_at, assignees, completed_at (plus 18 more). Returns the new Issue.

tools.name: projects_work-items_create-attachment-2
tools.description: Generate presigned URL for uploading file attachments to a work item. Required: issue_id, project_id, name, size. Optional: external_id, external_source, type.

params.name: external_id
params.description: External identifier for the asset (for integration tracking)

tools.name: projects_work-items_create-comment-2
tools.description: Add a new comment to a work item with HTML content. Required: issue_id, project_id. Optional: access, comment_html, comment_json (plus 2 more). Returns array of string.

tools.name: projects_work-items_create-link-2
tools.description: Add a new external link to a work item with URL, title, and metadata. Required: issue_id, project_id, url. Optional: title. Returns the new IssueLink.

tools.name: projects_work-items_create-relation
tools.description: Create relationships between work items. Supports various relation types including blocking, blocked_by, duplicate, relates_to, start_before, start_after, finish_before, and finish_after. Required: issue_id, project_id, issues, relation_type. Returns array of IssueRelation.

params.name: issues
params.description: Array of work item IDs to create relations with

params.name: relation_type
params.description: Type of relationship between work items * `blocking` - Blocking * `blocked_by` - Blocked By * `duplicate` - Duplicate * `relates_to` - Relates To * `start_before` - Start Before * `start_after` - Start After * `finish_before` - Finish Before * `finish_after` - Finish After

tools.name: projects_work-items_delete-2
tools.description: Permanently delete an existing work item from the project. Only admins or the item creator can perform this action. Required: pk, project_id. Destructive.

tools.name: projects_work-items_delete-attachment-2
tools.description: Permanently remove an attachment from a work item. Records deletion activity for audit purposes. Required: issue_id, pk, project_id. Destructive.

tools.name: projects_work-items_delete-comment-2
tools.description: Permanently remove a comment from a work item. Records deletion activity for audit purposes. Required: issue_id, pk, project_id. Destructive.

tools.name: projects_work-items_delete-link-2
tools.description: Permanently remove an external link from a work item. Required: issue_id, pk, project_id. Destructive.

tools.name: projects_work-items_list-2
tools.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all work items in a project. Supports filtering, ordering, and field selection through query parameters. Required: project_id. Optional: cursor, expand, external_id (plus 5 more). Returns array of Issue.

params.name: cursor
params.description: Pagination cursor for getting next set of results

params.name: expand
params.description: Comma-separated list of related fields to expand in response

params.name: external_id
params.description: External system identifier for filtering or lookup

params.name: external_source
params.description: External system source name for filtering or lookup

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in response

params.name: order_by
params.description: Field to order results by. Prefix with '-' for descending order

params.name: per_page
params.description: Number of results per page (default: 20, max: 100)

params.name: updated_at__gt
params.description: Incremental filter — return items updated after this RFC3339 timestamp.

tools.name: projects_work-items_list-activities-2
tools.description: Retrieve all activities for a work item. Supports filtering by activity type and date range. Required: issue_id, project_id. Optional: cursor, expand, fields (plus 3 more). Returns array of IssueActivity.

params.name: cursor
params.description: Pagination cursor for getting next set of results

params.name: expand
params.description: Comma-separated list of related fields to expand in response

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in response

params.name: order_by
params.description: Field to order results by. Prefix with '-' for descending order

params.name: per_page
params.description: Number of results per page (default: 20, max: 100)

params.name: updated_at__gt
params.description: Incremental filter — return items updated after this RFC3339 timestamp.

tools.name: projects_work-items_list-attachments-2
tools.description: Retrieve all attachments for a work item. Required: issue_id, project_id. Optional: updated_at__gt. Returns the IssueAttachment.

params.name: updated_at__gt
params.description: Incremental filter — return items updated after this RFC3339 timestamp.

tools.name: projects_work-items_list-comments-2
tools.description: Retrieve all comments for a work item. Required: issue_id, project_id. Optional: cursor, expand, fields (plus 3 more). Returns array of IssueComment.

params.name: cursor
params.description: Pagination cursor for getting next set of results

params.name: expand
params.description: Comma-separated list of related fields to expand in response

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in response

params.name: order_by
params.description: Field to order results by. Prefix with '-' for descending order

params.name: per_page
params.description: Number of results per page (default: 20, max: 100)

params.name: updated_at__gt
params.description: Incremental filter — return items updated after this RFC3339 timestamp.

tools.name: projects_work-items_list-links-2
tools.description: Retrieve all links associated with a work item. Supports filtering by URL, title, and metadata. Required: issue_id, project_id. Optional: cursor, expand, fields (plus 3 more). Returns array of IssueLink.

params.name: cursor
params.description: Pagination cursor for getting next set of results

params.name: expand
params.description: Comma-separated list of related fields to expand in response

params.name: fields

params.name: order_by
params.description: Field to order results by. Prefix with '-' for descending order

params.name: per_page
params.description: Number of results per page (default: 20, max: 100)

params.name: updated_at__gt
params.description: Incremental filter — return items updated after this RFC3339 timestamp.

tools.name: projects_work-items_list-relations
tools.description: Retrieve all relationships for a work item including blocking, blocked_by, duplicate, relates_to, start_before, start_after, finish_before, and finish_after relations. Required: issue_id, project_id. Optional: cursor, expand, fields (plus 3 more). Returns the IssueRelationResponse.

params.name: cursor
params.description: Pagination cursor for getting next set of results

params.name: expand
params.description: Comma-separated list of related fields to expand in response

params.name: order_by
params.description: Field to order results by. Prefix with '-' for descending order

params.name: per_page
params.description: Number of results per page (default: 20, max: 100)

params.name: updated_at__gt
params.description: Incremental filter — return items updated after this RFC3339 timestamp.

tools.name: projects_work-items_retrieve-2
tools.description: Retrieve details of a specific work item. Required: pk, project_id. Optional: expand, external_id, external_source (plus 2 more). Returns the Issue.

params.name: expand
params.description: Comma-separated list of related fields to expand in response

params.name: external_id
params.description: External system identifier for filtering or lookup

params.name: external_source
params.description: External system source name for filtering or lookup

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in response

params.name: order_by
params.description: Field to order results by. Prefix with '-' for descending order

tools.name: projects_work-items_retrieve-activity-2
tools.description: Retrieve details of a specific activity. Required: issue_id, pk, project_id. Optional: cursor, expand, fields (plus 2 more). Returns array of IssueActivity.

params.name: cursor
params.description: Pagination cursor for getting next set of results

params.name: expand
params.description: Comma-separated list of related fields to expand in response

params.name: fields

params.name: order_by
params.description: Field to order results by. Prefix with '-' for descending order

params.name: per_page
params.description: Number of results per page (default: 20, max: 100)

tools.name: projects_work-items_retrieve-attachment-2
tools.description: Download attachment file. Returns a redirect to the presigned download URL. Required: issue_id, pk, project_id.

tools.name: projects_work-items_retrieve-comment-2
tools.description: Retrieve details of a specific comment. Required: issue_id, pk, project_id. Returns array of string.

tools.name: projects_work-items_retrieve-link-2
tools.description: Retrieve details of a specific work item link. Required: issue_id, pk, project_id. Optional: cursor, expand, fields (plus 1 more). Returns array of IssueLink.

params.name: cursor
params.description: Pagination cursor for getting next set of results

params.name: expand
params.description: Comma-separated list of related fields to expand in response

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in response

params.name: per_page
params.description: Number of results per page (default: 20, max: 100)

tools.name: projects_work-items_update-2
tools.description: Partially update an existing work item with the provided fields. Supports external ID validation to prevent conflicts. Required: pk, project_id. Optional: archived_at, assignees, completed_at (plus 19 more). Returns the updated Issue.

tools.name: projects_work-items_update-comment-2
tools.description: Modify the content of an existing comment on a work item. Required: issue_id, pk, project_id. Optional: access, comment_html, comment_json (plus 2 more). Returns array of string.

tools.name: projects_work-items_update-issue-link-2
tools.description: Modify the URL, title, or metadata of an existing issue link. Required: issue_id, pk, project_id. Optional: title, url. Returns the updated IssueLink.

tools.name: projects_work-items_upload-attachment-2
tools.description: Mark an attachment as uploaded after successful file transfer to storage. Required: issue_id, pk, project_id. Partial update.

tools.name: stickies_create-sticky
tools.description: Create a new sticky in the workspace. Optional: background_color, color, created_by (plus 8 more). Returns array of Sticky.

tools.name: stickies_delete-sticky
tools.description: Delete a sticky by its ID. Required: pk. Destructive.

params.name: pk
params.description: A UUID string identifying this Sticky.

tools.name: stickies_list
tools.description: List all stickies in the workspace. Optional: updated_at__gt. Returns array of Sticky.

params.name: updated_at__gt
params.description: Incremental filter — return items updated after this RFC3339 timestamp.

tools.name: stickies_retrieve-sticky
tools.description: Retrieve a sticky by its ID. Required: pk. Returns array of Sticky.

params.name: pk
params.description: A UUID string identifying this Sticky.

tools.name: stickies_update-sticky
tools.description: Update a sticky by its ID. Required: pk. Optional: background_color, color, created_by (plus 8 more). Returns array of Sticky.

params.name: pk
params.description: A UUID string identifying this Sticky.

tools.name: users_get-current
tools.description: Retrieve the authenticated user's profile information including basic details. Returns the UserLite.

tools.name: work-items_get-workspace-2
tools.description: Retrieve a specific work item using workspace slug, project identifier, and issue identifier. Required: issue_identifier, project_identifier. Returns the Issue.

params.name: issue_identifier
params.description: Issue sequence ID (numeric identifier within project)

tools.name: work-items_search-2
tools.description: Perform semantic search across issue names, sequence IDs, and project identifiers. Required: search. Optional: limit, project_id, workspace_search. Returns the IssueSearch.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of results to return

params.name: project_id
params.description: Project ID for filtering results within a specific project

params.name: search
params.description: Search query to filter results by name, description, or identifier

params.name: workspace_search
params.description: Whether to search across entire workspace or within specific project
